examples:
<sqf>
_item = "HandGrenade";
private _fits = player canAddItemToVest _item;
if (_fits) then {
	player addItemToVest _item;
} else {
	hint "no room!";
};
</sqf>
name: canAddItemToVest

Item.desc: (Optional, default [[true]]) [[true]] to ignore 'soldierMaxLoad' param, container [[maxLoad]] is still counted.
Item.name: ignoreSoldierMaxLoad
